case_title: FINE BUILDERS LLC VS. OTIS STROMAN

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINE BUILDERS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT STROMAN, OTIS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

FEE WAIVER DENIED. DEFENDANT OTIS STROMAN HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO, CLERKS: R.EDWARDS/D.OKAZAKI, REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT STROMAN, OTIS
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: ORDER TO STRIKE FILED. (206)
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT STROMAN, OTIS
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT STROMAN, OTIS
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT STROMAN, OTIS
REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINE BUILDERS LLC COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-14-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT STROMAN, OTIS HEARING SET FOR FEB-16-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINE BUILDERS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STROMAN, OTIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 205 NINTH ST., #10, S.F., CA., STAYED UNTIL MAR-01-2005, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH TERMS OF SETTLEMENT, AN AMENDED JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE UNPAID BACK RENT, U.D. DAMAGES AND COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT STROMAN, OTIS
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT STROMAN, OTIS HEARING SET FOR FEB-16-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-14-2005 - MATTER SETTLED AFTER BEING SENT TO JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGEMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION WAS SIGNED. TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT WERE NOT PUT ON THE RECORD. HON. ROBERT DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. OKAZAKI REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE (206)

ADDITIONAL FEE WAIVER DENIED. DEFENDANT OTIS STROMAN HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO, CLERKS: R.EDWARDS/D.OKAZAKI, REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)
